title: Regular Expression Builder
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a Ruby regular expression pattern that matches strings containing at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit. The pattern should be case-insensitive and should validate the input string.
constraints: Must use a case-insensitive regular expression

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated regular expression should be syntactically valid
The generated regular expression should adhere to the specified constraints (case-insensitive and validates input string)
The generated regular expression should correctly match strings containing at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit
